Home › Image tools › Image Resizer

Resize images to exact dimensions

Resize to exact pixels, with or without aspect lock.

Files stay on your device. No accounts. Free.

Loading tool...

About this tool

Set a width and height in pixels and the tool resizes your image to match, keeping the original proportions if you ask it to, or filling the exact box if you don't. Output as PNG, JPG or WebP.

Use it for avatars, thumbnails, form uploads with pixel requirements, or just making screenshots manageable. Batches are resized with the same settings and zipped. Everything runs in your browser, so your photos never leave your device.

How it works

  1. Drop one or more images, they stay on your device.
  2. Pick your options and convert.
  3. Download the result; multiple files arrive as a single zip.

Frequently asked questions

Will resizing reduce the quality of my image?

Shrinking an image keeps it looking sharp because pixels are averaged down. Enlarging beyond the original size will look soft, since the browser has to invent pixels that were never there. When you need a bigger image, start from the largest original you have.

How do I resize without stretching or squashing the photo?

Leave the aspect lock on. Enter the one dimension you care about and the other is calculated for you, so the proportions never change.

Can I resize many images at once?

Yes. Drop a whole folder's worth, they are all resized with the same settings, and the results download together as one zip file.

Related tools

  • Image Cropper - Center-crop images to an exact frame size.
  • Image Compressor - Compress by quality, or hit an exact KB target.
  • Image Converter - Convert between PNG, JPG and WebP, alone or in batches.
